title: Queen Elizabeth Pushed for Ex-Prince Andrew to Get Envoy Position, New Documents Show
summary_full: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor is accused of sharing secrets with Jeffrey Epstein when he was a British trade envoy. Newly released documents shed some light on how he got the appointment.
summary_public: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor is accused of sharing secrets with Jeffrey Epstein when he was a British trade envoy. Newly released documents shed some light on how he got the appointment.
